name: Anti-Cholesterol Drink
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 cups of apple juice with 2 cups of grape juice in a large pitcher.
2. Add 1/4 cup of vinegar to the mixture and stir gently until combined.
3. Serve the drink chilled or over ice.
4. Drink this mixture every morning for several weeks, as some people claim it has helped lower their cholesterol levels significantly.
